criterion-02.description: src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts contains export interface CLIAdapter with parseSkillsOutput and parseDelegateOutput methods
criterion-02.evidence: cli-adapter.ts:7-10 — export interface CLIAdapter { parseSkillsOutput(raw: string): WorkflowMeta[]; parseDelegateOutput(raw: string): DelegateEvent[]; }

criterion-03.description: src/lib/server/cli-adapter.ts contains export class UnsupportedVersionError extends Error
criterion-03.evidence: cli-adapter.ts:19 — export class UnsupportedVersionError extends Error

criterion-04.evidence: types.ts:119-125 — export interface WorkflowMeta { id, name, category, description, params }

criterion-05.evidence: types.ts:128-135 — export interface DelegateEvent { type, executionId, stepIndex?, stepName?, output?, timestamp }

criterion-06.description: CLIAdapterRegistry.detectVersion() calls child_process.exec and returns Promise
criterion-06.evidence: cli-adapter.ts:100-117 — detectVersion(): Promise<string> calls this.execFn('maestro --version', callback) where execFn defaults to exec from node:child_process (line 3, line 76)

criterion-07.description: CLIAdapterRegistry.getAdapter(version) returns matching adapter or throws UnsupportedVersionError
criterion-07.evidence: cli-adapter.ts:88-94 — getAdapter(version: string): CLIAdapter { const adapter = this.adapters.get(version); if (!adapter) throw new UnsupportedVersionError(version); return adapter; }

criterion-09.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:40-43 — constructor(private eventBus: EventBus, private spawnFn: SpawnFn = spawn) {}

criterion-10.description: DelegateExecutor.execute() calls child_process.spawn and returns executionId string
criterion-10.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:50-115 — execute(workflowId, params): string { ... this.spawnFn('maestro', ['delegate', prompt, '--to', tool, '--mode', 'write']); ... return executionId; } where spawnFn defaults to spawn from node:child_process (line 3)

criterion-11.description: DelegateExecutor.onEvent() registers callback and returns unsubscribe function
criterion-11.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:121-126 — onEvent(callback): () => void { this.globalCallbacks.add(callback); return () => { this.globalCallbacks.delete(callback); }; }

criterion-12.description: DelegateExecutor.stop() kills process and removes from activeProcesses
criterion-12.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:132-138 — stop(executionId: string): void { const entry = this.activeProcesses.get(executionId); if (entry) { entry.process.kill(); this.activeProcesses.delete(executionId); } }

criterion-13.description: EventBus.publish called with WorkflowEvents constants on each broker event type
criterion-13.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:22-27 — DELEGATE_TO_WORKFLOW_EVENT maps queued->EXECUTION_STARTED, started->STEP_UPDATE, completed->EXECUTION_COMPLETED, failed->EXECUTION_FAILED; delegate-executor.ts:191-199 — this.eventBus.publish(workflowEvent, Channels.WORKFLOW, payload, 'server')

criterion-16.description: MaestroIDEServer has cliAdapter and delegateExecutor properties
criterion-16.evidence: index.ts:19-20 — readonly cliAdapter: CLIAdapterRegistry; readonly delegateExecutor: DelegateExecutor; initialized at lines 32-34

criterion-20.description: start() is async and calls await init()
criterion-20.evidence: index.ts:125-126 — async start(): Promise<void> { await this.init(); ... }

criterion-21.description: ProjectRadar.svelte contains {#each} over milestones, phases, steps
criterion-21.evidence: ProjectRadar.svelte:52 — {#each $projectState.milestones as milestone}; line 70 — {#each milestone.phases as phase}; line 88 — {#each phase.steps as step}

criterion-23.evidence: +page.svelte:3-4 — import ProjectRadar from '$lib/client/components/ProjectRadar.svelte'; import WorkflowCommander from '$lib/client/components/WorkflowCommander.svelte';

criterion-24.description: Run npx vitest run and verify all 83 tests pass
criterion-24.evidence: vitest output: Test Files 6 passed (6), Tests 83 passed (83), Duration 1.30s

criterion-25.description: No raw maestro terms (delegate/session/skill) in user-visible string literals in frontend components
criterion-25.evidence: grep for delegate|session|skill in src/lib/client/ and src/routes/ returned no matches

truths.evidence: Each criterion verified with file:line evidence above

truths.criterion: No raw maestro terms in frontend user-visible strings
truths.evidence: grep of src/lib/client/ and src/routes/ for delegate/session/skill returned zero matches

truths.criterion: EventBus.publish uses WorkflowEvents constants (not string literals)
truths.evidence: delegate-executor.ts:22-27 DELEGATE_TO_WORKFLOW_EVENT maps to WorkflowEvents constants; delegate-executor.ts:193 this.eventBus.publish(workflowEvent, ...)

artifacts.evidence: 119 lines, full implementation with CLIAdapterRegistry, DefaultCLIAdapter, UnsupportedVersionError
176 lines, full MaestroIDEServer class with constructor/setupRoutes/init/start/stop and auto-start block

149 lines, comprehensive type definitions: WorkflowExecution, ExecutionStep, ProjectState, Milestone, Phase, PhaseStep, DialogSession, TerminalSession, ApprovalGate, WSMessage, Recommendation, WorkflowMeta, DelegateEvent, StateSyncEvent
69 lines, all event channel and type constants: Channels, WorkflowEvents, ProjectEvents, DialogEvents, TerminalEvents, GateEvents, StateSyncEvents, EventType union
192 lines, full translation registry with 10 entries, translate/shouldHide/translatePayload/translateString/findEntry functions
191 lines, full tree-view component with {#each} over milestones/phases/steps, expand/collapse, status colors, simple-mode hiding
552 lines, full two-panel component with workflow list, execution progress, fetch('/api/workflows'), fetch('/api/workflows/execute')
82 lines, writable/derived stores for connectionState, displayMode, projectState, activeWorkflows, recommendations with WSClient integration
182 lines, full page layout with ProjectRadar and WorkflowCommander imports, mode toggle, connection status
7 lines, imports app.css and renders children
Referenced by +layout.svelte line 2 but file does not exist on disk

key_links.issue: Import path ./ws-client.js is incorrect; file is at ../services/ws-client.ts

gaps.description: stores/index.ts imports WSClient from './ws-client.js' but the file is located at '../services/ws-client.ts' — import path is broken
gaps.fix_direction: Change import path in stores/index.ts line 6 from './ws-client.js' to '../services/ws-client.js'

gaps.description: WSClient class uses Svelte 5 $state runes but is passed as first argument to derived() which expects a Svelte store with subscribe() method — WSClient does not implement subscribe()
gaps.fix_direction: Either make WSClient implement the Svelte store contract (subscribe method) or refactor stores/index.ts to use a different reactive pattern compatible with $state-based classes

gaps.description: WorkflowCommander.svelte fetch('/api/workflows') parses response as WorkflowMeta[] but the API returns { workflows: WorkflowMeta[], version: string } — data contract mismatch
gaps.fix_direction: Update WorkflowCommander.svelte line 23 to destructure: .then((data: { workflows: WorkflowMeta[] }) => { workflows = data.workflows; })

gaps.description: +layout.svelte imports '../app.css' but src/app.css does not exist on disk
gaps.fix_direction: Create src/app.css with base styles, or remove the import from +layout.svelte

gaps.description: Server-side files use console.log/console.error/console.warn for logging (index.ts:115,140,153,172; delegate-executor.ts:92,174,185; event-bus.ts:87,97; ws-gateway.ts:64,74; ws-client.ts:49). These are acceptable for server-side diagnostic logging but should be replaced with a proper logger in production
gaps.fix_direction: Consider introducing a structured logger (e.g., pino) in a future phase
